stories.title: Famous "Pick Up Artist" Reduced to Hitting on AI Girlfriend
stories.simple_summary: Someone who gave dating advice became so unpopular that he's now using an AI girlfriend instead of real people.
stories.why_it_matters: This doesn't affect you — it's just entertainment news about one person.

stories.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI (the company behind ChatGPT) is hiring someone to make ChatGPT easier to use for families and older adults.
stories.why_it_matters: If you're an older adult or have family members who are, ChatGPT might become friendlier and easier to use for you.

stories.title: The Best AI Degrees And How To Choose The Right Major
stories.simple_summary: A guide about college degrees focused on artificial intelligence.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mainly for young people choosing college majors — it doesn't affect current business owners or retirees.

stories.title: Micron CEO Sanjay Mehrotra Announces $250 Billion Investment for Expanded Artificial Intelligence (AI) Memory Chip Development
stories.simple_summary: A computer chip company announced it will spend $250 billion building better chips for AI computers.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and tech companies — it's not something an ordinary person needs to know about.

stories.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.simple_summary: Instagram removed a feature that let people use AI to create fake pictures of other people's accounts because users complained it wasn't right.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Instagram, this is good news — the company listened and removed a tool that could create fake pictures of you without permission.

stories.title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
stories.simple_summary: Meta (Instagram's owner) turned off an AI tool that had let people make fake images of any public Instagram user without their permission.
stories.why_it_matters: If you or your business have an Instagram account, this protects you from having fake AI pictures made of you without asking.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI, alleging artificial intelligence company stole trade secrets
stories.simple_summary: Apple filed a legal complaint saying OpenAI (the company behind ChatGPT) stole secret information from Apple.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a court case between two giant companies — it doesn't directly affect your daily life, though it's worth watching to see how these disputes get settled.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
stories.simple_summary: Apple is suing OpenAI, claiming that former Apple employees who now work at OpenAI stole Apple's secret hardware plans.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a court battle between two big companies — it doesn't affect you unless you own Apple or OpenAI stock.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
stories.simple_summary: Apple accuses OpenAI's leaders of directing employees to steal Apple's secret information.
stories.why_it_matters: This is important for investors in these companies to follow, but ordinary people and small-business owners don't need to act on it.

stories.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
stories.simple_summary: More and more companies are using free, shared AI tools (like a library anyone can borrow from) instead of expensive private ones, and half of large companies are doing this now.
stories.why_it_matters: This means AI tools are becoming cheaper and easier for small businesses to use, since the free versions are getting better and better.

stories.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
stories.simple_summary: A Korean chip company raised $26.5 billion in the stock market and the U.S. government is asking them to build computer chip factories in America.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly important for investors and the government's plans to build tech factories — it won't change your daily life.

stories.title: How KTern.AI built agentic AI for SAP on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
stories.simple_summary: A company built an AI assistant that works with Amazon's cloud computer services to help with business software from a company called SAP.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mainly for engineers and large companies using SAP software — nothing you need to act on as a small-business owner.
